description: Ethos is an online life insurance and estate-planning service. It sells life insurance directly and through agents and partners, including embedded partner integrations for quoting, underwriting, and policy application flows.
summary: Ethos exposes a public MCP endpoint at https://eg.ethoslife.com/mcp and documents a partner HTTP API for embedded life-insurance workflows, but public docs do not provide a machine-readable spec, base URL, or enough binding detail to determine authentication mechanics conclusively.
